notes: MTP-preserved GGUF for testing native draft-mtp speculative decoding in current llama.cpp builds.
Qwen documents 262,144 tokens as the native context length for Qwen3.6; the local qwen3.6-mtp profile uses that native context.
The local llama.cpp profile uses --spec-type draft-mtp and --spec-draft-n-max 4.
Selected as the initial Apple Silicon 128 GB target because UD-Q5_K_XL balances quality and memory headroom better than Q6 while retaining more precision than Q4.
Local file size and SHA-256 were recorded after download on 2026-05-24.
Upstream provenance should still be treated as unverified until this SHA-256 is matched against a published source checksum.
